name: open-memory-archive
description: Offline-first archive format, builder, validator, and viewer for personal and community memory projects.

scripts.build:redacted: node src/cli.js build examples/redacted-family/archive.json --privacy-profile public-demo --out dist/redacted-family
scripts.build:community: node src/cli.js build-folder examples/community-memory --privacy-profile public-demo --out dist/community-memory
